skills.name: availability-inquiry
skills.description: Help customers prepare accurate Rolling Oaks Daylilies availability and order inquiries without assuming plants are currently available.

skills.name: catalog-navigation
skills.description: Navigate Rolling Oaks Daylilies catalog pages, find daylily listings, and guide users toward availability confirmation.

skills.name: cultivar-reference
skills.description: Use Rolling Oaks Daylilies listing pages as cultivar references while preserving visible source context and uncertainty.

skills.name: site-navigation
skills.description: Navigate Rolling Oaks Daylilies as a customer-facing site, including catalogs, search, cart, blog, and contact paths.
